# Stage 3 Report тАФ Authentication & Roles

- **Date:** 2026-06-23 ┬╖ **Branch:** `build/v1` ┬╖ **Commit:** `d030e68`

## Goal
User access control: email+password login, server-side sessions, admin/assignee roles, protected
endpoints, and a seeded first admin.

## Implemented
- **Schema:** `users.password_hash` column + Alembic migration `2fe660361238` (autogenerated, single
  `add_column`; the deployed initial migration was not edited).
- **`aiwip_api.auth`:** bcrypt password hashing (72-byte-normalized); **Redis-backed server-side
  sessions** (opaque `secrets.token_urlsafe` token in Redis with 7-day TTL, referenced by an httpOnly
  `aiwip_session` cookie тАФ D5); FastAPI deps `get_current_user` and `require_admin`.
- **Routers:** `/api/auth` (`POST /login`, `POST /logout`, `GET /me`); `/api/users`
  (`GET` list + `POST` create) тАФ **admin-only** via `require_admin`.
- **Seed:** `aiwip_api.seed.ensure_admin` (idempotent) + `python -m aiwip_api.seed` CLI
  (`ADMIN_EMAIL`/`ADMIN_PASSWORD`).

## Role Matrix
| Action | Admin | Assignee | Unauthenticated |
|---|---|---|---|
| `POST /api/auth/login` (valid creds) | 200 | 200 | тАФ |
| `GET /api/auth/me` | 200 | 200 | **401** |
| `GET/POST /api/users` (user mgmt) | 200 | **403** | **401** |
| run sync (Stage 4) | тЬУ planned (`require_admin`) | 403 planned | 401 planned |

`require_admin` is the reusable guard; Stage 4 sync endpoints + Stage 6 assignee management attach to it
(so "assignee cannot run sync / manage users" is enforced by the same mechanism proven here).

## Tests Run / Results
- `.venv/bin/python -m pytest` тЖТ **29 passed** vs real Postgres 16 + Redis 8.
- Stage 3 (`api/tests/test_auth.py`, 11): password hash roundtrip; loginтЖТmeтЖТlogout; wrong password 401;
  unknown email 401; unauth `/me` 401; admin lists/creates users; assignee 403 on both; unauth 401;
  seed idempotent.
- **Seed CLI end-to-end** (real app DB): ran twice тЖТ same admin (id=1), 1 row тАФ idempotent confirmed.

## Bugs Found / Fixed
- redis-py `setex` deprecation тЖТ switched to `set(..., ex=)`.

## Remaining Risks / Gaps (deferred, from Stage 0 ┬з9)
- **No password reset, login rate-limiting, or session refresh/rotation** тАФ deferred to QA hardening
  (Stage 14); acceptable for a single-admin MVP.
- Cookie `secure=False` (local HTTP); set `secure=True` behind TLS in production.
- тЪая╕П A **dev admin `admin@aiwip.local` / `changeme-dev`** was seeded into the local app DB to verify the
  CLI тАФ change or delete before any real use.

## Decisions Made
- **build-D5:** Server-side sessions in **Redis** (opaque token + httpOnly cookie), not JWT тАФ matches
  D5 "server-side session" and reuses provisioned Redis.
- `users.password_hash` is **nullable** (supports future SSO / record-only users); the auth layer treats
  a missing hash as "cannot log in".
- API test isolation uses `Session(join_transaction_mode="create_savepoint")` so endpoint `commit()`s
  stay rolled back per test.

## Files Changed
`core/src/aiwip_core/models.py`, `core/alembic/versions/2fe660361238_add_users_password_hash.py`,
`api/pyproject.toml`, `api/src/aiwip_api/{main,auth,schemas,seed}.py`,
`api/src/aiwip_api/routers/{__init__,auth,users}.py`, `api/tests/{conftest,test_auth}.py`.

## Next Recommended Stage
**Stage 4 тАФ Telethon Connector & Sync Engine.** тЪая╕П **Live integration**: needs real Telegram
`api_id`/`api_hash`, an interactive phone-login/2FA to mint a session string, and a consenting target
chat (plus the week-0 survivability spike, R2). Connector will be built behind an interface with a
mock for tests regardless (Test Plan mandates mocked-data connector tests).

## Proceed / Do Not Proceed
**PROCEED to Stage 4** тАФ auth foundation is complete and verified (29 passing). Stage 4's *live* path is
gated on Telegram credentials from the user; the connector + sync engine + mocked-data tests can be
built and verified without them, with live wiring when creds arrive.
